rationale: Educ. Code §35.008 concerns agency assistance to school districts for chapter compliance. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The agency may provide assistance to school districts and open-enrollment charter schools in complying with this chapter.
_note: Rule text pertains to agency assistance under Educ. Code Ch. 35 (H.B. 900), not to property tax or homestead exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
